_meta.unit: Early Task 4 (big-five sweep, house 1 of 5) — LV lexicon: models + lines/canvases/leathers + named seasonal colorways

types.material: canvas / leather / finish line, the qualifier vocabulary

_meta.caveat: Regime A house: LV names = <Model> <Line>. Model and line are separate facts kept apart. Debut years sourced or marked low; none invented. Two intro-year conflicts flagged not smoothed: Empreinte 2010 (leather) vs 2012 (handbag line per Yoogi's); Vernis 1997 (Marc Jacobs) vs first color 1998. louisvuitton.com Akamai-blocks Firecrawl scrapes, so 2023-2026 season-labeled colors are queued for the owner-present Chrome path.

coverage.colors: Vernis + Epi dated archive (sample, through ~2015) + Empreinte name list (undated); 2023-2026 season-labeled colors queued

name: Speedy
note: Soft rectangular city bag; Speedy 25 born 1965 from an Audrey Hepburn request to shrink the Keepall; the 'Express' shape dates to 1930.

name: Speedy Bandoulière
note: Speedy with a detachable shoulder strap (Bandoulière); modern crossbody-friendly version.

name: Neverfull
note: Open cinch-side tote; one of LV's all-time best sellers.

name: Alma
note: Rectangular base + rounded top, Art Deco; created by Gaston-Louis Vuitton; named for the Alma bridge; originally 'Champs-Elysees', lore says a custom for Coco Chanel.

name: Capucines
note: Top-handle leather flap, single large LV; flap reveals or hides the Monogram flower; named for Rue Neuve des Capucines. Late 2013.

name: OnTheGo
note: Large structured reversible tote. Year also confirmed on the LV Heritage page (search snippet).

name: Pochette Métis
note: Compact structured satchel, chain+leather strap, S-lock; original 2012 in Monogram canvas; Empreinte added later. Resale workhorse.

name: Twist
note: Leather shoulder bag with an LV clasp that physically twists to lock; Epi Twist MM is a signature.

name: Coussin
note: Puffy quilted Monogram-embossed lambskin with chunky chain; the 2020s 'it' launch.

name: Dauphine
note: Structured flap with interlocking LV clasp + contrast trim; a Ghesquiere reissue of a 1970s shape. Year from established beat; reddit cross-ref only.

name: Keepall
note: The original soft travel duffle; Audrey Hepburn's shrunk Keepall became the Speedy 25.

name: Bumbag
note: Monogram belt/waist bag; rode the late-2010s fanny-pack revival. Year from established beat, not re-sourced.

name: NéoNoé
note: Bucket bag; modern reissue of the Noe with a top strap and structured base.

name: Noé
note: The original drawstring bucket; built 1932 to carry 5-6 champagne bottles.

name: Boulogne
note: Small curved shoulder bag with flat strap; 1980s heritage, discontinued then reissued in the 2020s. Debut era from established beat.

name: Montaigne
note: Structured top-handle with rolled handles + strap; named for Avenue Montaigne; Empreinte signature.

name: Favorite
note: Slim crossbody clutch with chain; 2010s original, reissued as 'Favorite' in 2024. Reissue year from established beat.

name: Félicie Pochette
note: Flat chain pochette with removable insert pouches. Year from established beat; only unboxing cross-refs this run.

name: Graceful
note: Lightweight open hobo tote. Year from established beat.

name: Delightful
note: Lightweight hobo, perforated then plain; predecessor look to Graceful. Year from established beat.

name: CarryAll
note: Roomy structured bag; heritage name reissued in the 2020s. Reissue year from established beat.

name: Petite Malle
note: Hard mini-trunk-shaped bag with S-lock; Ghesquiere signature. Year confirmed on LV Heritage page (search snippet).

name: Multi Pochette Accessoires
note: Viral set: Pochette + mini Pochette + round coin purse on a bright strap.

name: Bella
note: Soft bucket bag in perforated Mahina leather; 'Bella Mahina'. Mahina line dates to 2007; Bella model year from established beat.

name: Lockit
note: Structured bag with the Inventeur lock; the Suhali 'Le Inoubliable' is its ancestor.

name: Tivoli
note: Rounded Monogram shoulder bag; named for the town near Rome. Year from established beat.

name: Galliera
note: Monogram hobo; named for the Galliera fashion museum. Year from established beat.

name: Sologne
note: Small crossbody messenger with buckle flap; 1990s-2000s. Era from established beat, year approximate.

name: Papillon
note: Cylinder/barrel bag with a small round pouch; a 1960s shape.

name: Monogram
note: PVC-coated cotton canvas, LV + fleurs/quatrefoils, untreated vachetta trim that patinas. First true luxury logo + anti-counterfeit device. Cross-checked yoogiscloset + vogue.

name: Monogram Reverse
note: Inverted Monogram: caramel motif on a darker ground. Debuted alongside Eclipse.

name: Monogram Empreinte
note: Full-grain calfskin heat-embossed with Monogram; supple, holds shape. Intro-year conflict: Xupes/Bag Religion 2010 (leather), Yoogi's 2012 (handbag line).

name: Monogram Mini Lin
note: Lighter cotton/linen/polyamide Monogram canvas; renamed Idylle in 2010. Intro era ~mid-2000s.

name: Monogram Idylle
note: The reinvented + renamed Mini Lin canvas; jacquard-woven Monogram.

name: Monogram Multicolore
note: Screen-printed Monogram in 33 colors on white or black (Takashi Murakami). Highly collectible. Cross-checked yoogiscloset.

name: Monogram Vernis
note: Patent-coated calfskin, glossy, Monogram-embossed; the seasonal-color line. Introduced 1997 by Marc Jacobs; first color (Beige) 1998. Cross-checked vogue.

name: Monogram Eclipse
note: Greyscale Monogram (black/grey) coated canvas; men's.

name: Monogram Denim
note: Stonewashed denim Monogram; blue/green/pink/grey/black.

name: Damier Ebène
note: Original chequered canvas: chocolate + brown squares, dark trim. Predates Monogram; re-released 1998 for Monogram's centenary. Cross-checked yoogiscloset.

name: Damier Azur
note: Ivory + pale-blue Damier; 'French Riviera'. Cross-checked yoogiscloset.

name: Damier Graphite
note: Black + grey monochrome Damier; men's. Released for the canvas's 120th anniversary. Cross-checked yoogiscloset.

name: Epi
maps_to: Alma PM, Twist MM, Speedy 25 Epi
note: Vegetable-tanned cowhide, ridged textured grain, minimal branding; LV's first leather line, inspired by a 1920s grained leather. Cross-checked yoogiscloset.

name: Mahina
note: Ultra-soft calfskin with perforated Monogram; named for a Polynesian moon deity. Cross-checked yoogiscloset.

name: Taurillon
note: Soft grained calf leather with visible grain; scratch-resistant, softens over time. The Capucines is built in Taurillon.

name: Taïga
note: Fine-grained matte structured leather; LV's first dedicated men's leather; named for the Siberian forest. Cross-checked yoogiscloset.

name: Suhali
note: Hand-selected goat leather, natural grain, supple-yet-durable; pieces named with French adjectives describing 'the LV woman'.

name: Nomade
note: Smooth supple natural full-grain leather (vachetta family) used on heritage hard-sided + special order pieces. Not separately dated this run; established beat.

name: Antheia
note: Soft grained leather hobo line of the early 2010s. Year approximate from established beat.

name: Beige
note: One of the first Vernis colors.

name: Pomme d'Amour
note: Candy-apple red; a signature Vernis color.

name: Amarante
note: Deep aubergine; the cult Vernis neutral.

name: Amethyste
note: Color name also used in Empreinte.

name: Noir (Black)
note: Always available; the permanent Epi core.

name: Borneo Green
note: Original Epi launch color.

name: Toledo Blue
note: Original Epi launch color.

name: Cassis
note: Deep blackcurrant.

name: Figue / Piment / Indigo / Fuchsia (Rainbow set)
note: Part of the 2011 bright 'Rainbow' Epi assortment (also Menthe, Cacao, Gres, Citron, Cyan, Carmine).

name: Quetsche / Pistache / Saphir / Coquelicot / Mimosa
note: 2014 Epi assortment (also Dune, Rose Nacre, Anthracite Nacre, Bordeaux).

name: Rose Ballerine
note: The millennial-pink Epi (also Poppy, Pivoine, Rouge Pomodoro in 2015).

name: Safran
note: From Yoogi's Empreinte color list; source does not date it per season. Queued for a season-page pass.

name: Orient
note: From Yoogi's Empreinte color list; undated in source.

name: Aurore
note: From Yoogi's Empreinte color list; undated in source.

name: Infini
note: Navy; from Yoogi's Empreinte color list; undated in source. Full list also: Amethyste, Cerise, Galet, Jaipur, Bronze, Havane, Flamme, Terre, Celeste, Ombre, Neige, Orage.

name: Cognac / Blue Jean / Brume
note: Recent Empreinte seasonal names surfacing in 2025 trade content (with 'Low Key' leather in Prussian Blue). Single source; logged as a lead pending a second confirmation.

name: Le Fabuleux / L'Ingenieux / Le Inoubliable
note: Suhali pieces are named with French adjectives (the LV woman). 'Le Inoubliable' = the Suhali Lockit. Full set: L'Impetueux, L'Epanoui, L'Affriolant, L'Aimable, L'Imprevisible, Le Talentueux.
